Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Is everything all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How should I tell her about[n]Koromaru's true feelings?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't talk about Personas[n]or the Dark Hour...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Would this happen to be about Koromaru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Hehe, don't worry about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I know Koromaru has his own reasons and his own problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}He's such a sweet, smart boy, isn't he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Don't worry, I understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Sometimes you don't even need words, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}He's such a sweet, smart boy, isn't he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}So really, I'm all right. But thank you for being so thoughtful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}He looks just like he did when he was with the priest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}He must really trust you from the bottom of his heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Please, take good care of Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_009_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll look after him till the end.

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Koromaru heard me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Koromaru really has been blessed with so many wonderful friends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Be sure to cherish them, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}You'll be at that dorm from now on, won't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Hehe, well I'll have to visit you again, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a strong sense of trust[n]coming from Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I took an overjoyed Koromaru[n]on a walk before going home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_SPEEDUP_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}The Agility of Koromaru's Persona, {f 0 1 1}Cerberus{f 0 1 27}, was raised by 3.[n]{f 1 1}
